re7-labs.name: Re7 Labs
re7-labs.description: Re7 Labs is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure onchain vaults and lending markets. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

mev-capital.name: MEV Capital
mev-capital.description: MEV Capital is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure vaults across selected DeFi markets. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

k3-capital.name: K3 Capital
k3-capital.description: K3 Capital is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure vaults across selected DeFi markets. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

keyring.name: Keyring
keyring.description: Keyring provides identity and access-control infrastructure that may be used to configure permissioned market access on Euler.

reservoir-labs.name: Reservoir Labs
reservoir-labs.description: Reservoir Labs is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure selected DeFi markets. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

9summits.name: 9 Summits
9summits.description: 9 Summits is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure vaults across selected DeFi markets. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

turtle.name: Turtle
turtle.description: Turtle is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure vaults connected to liquidity distribution strategies. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.
